use_cases: Display user wallet balance and payment information in fintech applications
Show virtual card details in digital banking dashboards
Present subscription plan limits and spending in SaaS platforms
Display payment method in e-commerce checkout flows
Show crypto or token balances in Web3 applications
ai_summary: A visually styled wallet card component designed to display financial information such as balance, card details, or payment method. Typically features modern gradient or glass-morphism aesthetics with subtle hover interactions. Commonly used in fintech dashboards, e-commerce platforms, and digital payment interfaces to present monetary data in an attractive, scannable format.
